basics.name: Oscar Tio
basics.label: Computer Engineering Student
basics.summary: Computer Engineering student at the University of Hawaii at Manoa graduating May 2026. Experience with LiDAR sensing, robotics software, data processing, and embedded systems. Interested in robotics, sensing systems, and software development.

projects.name: Impedance Analysis
highlights: Developed impedance analysis workflows for microfluidic sensing experiments
Designed fabrication procedures for microfluidic devices
Performed data collection and analysis using MATLAB
Created protocols for fabrication, data collection, and data processing

projects.name: LiDAR Object Detection and Mapping
projects.summary: LiDAR sensing project focused on detection and reconstruction of non-explosive objects.
highlights: Collected LiDAR point-cloud data from non-explosive surrogate targets
Processed LiDAR data using Python and ROS2
Developed data collection and processing workflows

work.summary: Responsible for tactical communications systems and radio operations.
highlights: Maintained and operated tactical radio systems
Conducted training sessions on radio operation procedures
